<!-- source-hash: a4f51068b4d886ab48a9b0e9483275fc -->
A DTO representing a paginated response containing a list of audit log events, used in the OpenFrame external API.

## Key Components

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `logs` | `List<LogResponse>` | Collection of individual log event entries |
| `pageInfo` | `PageInfo` | Pagination metadata (page number, size, total, etc.) |

## Usage Example

```java
// Building a LogsResponse from a paginated query result
List<LogResponse> logEntries = auditService.fetchLogs(filter);

PageInfo pagination = PageInfo.builder()
    .page(0)
    .size(20)
    .totalElements(logEntries.size())
    .build();

LogsResponse response = LogsResponse.builder()
    .logs(logEntries)
    .pageInfo(pagination)
    .build();
```

## Notes

- Annotated with `@Schema` for automatic OpenAPI/Swagger documentation generation
- Lombok annotations (`@Data`, `@Builder`, `@NoArgsConstructor`, `@AllArgsConstructor`) handle boilerplate generation
- Designed for use in paginated audit log API endpoints within the OpenFrame external API surface
